common.appDescription: Deep self-discovery platform through scientific tests and AI analysis

landing.heroSub: 300+ questions across 7 dimensions. Scientific methodologies. AI analysis. Honest criticism mode.
landing.step2Desc: From simple questions to deep self-analysis
landing.step3Desc: Visual results + AI analysis on demand
landing.reportPreviewSub: AI synthesizes all 11 tests into a single psychological portrait
landing.reportPreviewText1: Your profile reveals an unconventional pattern. High openness to experience (87%) combined with moderate extraversion (48%) is rare — you're drawn to new ideas but process them internally. Conscientiousness (78%) explains why you rarely abandon projects even when interest fades halfway through. A secure attachment style (anxiety 15%) makes you a stable partner — a strength that's easy to underestimate.
landing.reportPreviewBlur1Text: Your RIASEC profile points to three most suitable directions. The Investigative type (81%) combined with...
landing.reportPreviewBlur2Text: Your primary love language is physical touch (100%). This explains why you feel most connected when...
landing.reportPreviewBlur3Text: 5 concrete steps for the next 90 days, derived from the analysis of all 11 tests...
landing.reportPreviewCtaSub: Take the tests first — it's free
